creator: kaltheat@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Naram Qashat from comment #0)

I think it might be good idea to wait some time for the new project to settle down.

As you can see here[1] they debate the name of the project.

Another issue I found when I rushed through their pages is that they "blindly" replaced "livestreamer" by "streamlink" resulting in that they claim streamlink is available for FreeBSD[2] though it obviously isn't ...

Anyway I tried porting it myself by adapting the livestreamer port (before I knew that you already made a port) and it seemed to work without FreeBSD-related issues on FreeBSD ...

And for the records: here[3] are the reasons why they forked livestreamer.


[1] https://github.com/streamlink/streamlink/issues/65
[2] https://streamlink.github.io/install.html#linux-and-bsd-packages
[3] https://github.com/streamlink/streamlink/issues/3#issuecomment-247799803
